# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.

Prevent hardcoded secrets.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

<?php

// config/services.php (add to existing config)
// 'twilio' => [
//     'sid' => env('TWILIO_SID'),
//     'auth_token' => env('TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN'),
//     'from_number' => env('TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER'),
// ],

// .env entries needed:
// TWILIO_SID=your_account_sid
// TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN=your_auth_token
// TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER=+1234567890

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use InvalidArgumentException;
use RuntimeException;

class TwilioSmsService
{
    protected string $accountSid;
    protected string $authToken;
    protected string $fromNumber;
    protected string $baseUrl;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->accountSid = config('services.twilio.sid');
        $this->authToken = config('services.twilio.auth_token');
        $this->fromNumber = config('services.twilio.from_number');

        if (empty($this->accountSid) || empty($this->authToken) || empty($this->fromNumber)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                'Twilio credentials are not properly configured. Please set TWILIO_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, and TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER in your .env file.'
            );
        }

        $this->baseUrl = "https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01/Accounts/{$this->accountSid}";
    }

    /**
     * Send an SMS message via Twilio API.
     *
     * @param string $to The recipient phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890)
     * @param string $body The message body
     * @param string|null $from Optional override for the sender number
     * @return array The Twilio API response
     *
     * @throws InvalidArgumentException
     * @throws RuntimeException
     */
    public function sendSms(string $to, string $body, ?string $from = null): array
    {
        $this->validatePhoneNumber($to);
        $this->validateMessageBody($body);

        $from = $from ?? $this->fromNumber;
        $this->validatePhoneNumber($from);

        $url = "{$this->baseUrl}/Messages.json";

        try {
            $response = Http::withBasicAuth($this->accountSid, $this->authToken)
                ->timeout(30)
                ->retry(3, 100, function ($exception) {
                    return $exception instanceof \Illuminate\Http\Client\ConnectionException;
                })
                ->asForm()
                ->post($url, [
                    'To' => $to,
                    'From' => $from,
                    'Body' => $body,
                ]);

            if ($response->successful()) {
                $responseData = $response->json();

                Log::info('SMS sent successfully', [
                    'sid' => $responseData['sid'] ?? null,
                    'to' => $to,
                    'status' => $responseData['status'] ?? null,
                ]);

                return [
                    'success' => true,
                    'message_sid' => $responseData['sid'] ?? null,
                    'status' => $responseData['status'] ?? null,
                    'data' => $responseData,
                ];
            }

            $errorData = $response->json();
            $errorMessage = $errorData['message'] ?? 'Unknown Twilio API error';
            $errorCode = $errorData['code'] ?? $response->status();

            Log::error('Twilio SMS sending failed', [
                'to' => $to,
                'http_status' => $response->status(),
                'error_code' => $errorCode,
                'error_message' => $errorMessage,
            ]);

            throw new RuntimeException(
                "Twilio API error [{$errorCode}]: {$errorMessage}",
                $response->status()
            );
        } catch (RuntimeException $e) {
            throw $e;
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            Log::error('Failed to send SMS via Twilio', [
                'to' => $to,
                'exception' => $e->getMessage(),
            ]);

            throw new RuntimeException(
                "Failed to send SMS: {$e->getMessage()}",
                0,
                $e
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Send SMS to multiple recipients.
     *
     * @param array $recipients Array of phone numbers in E.164 format
     * @param string $body The message body
     * @return array Results for each recipient
     */
    public function sendBulkSms(array $recipients, string $body): array
    {
        $results = [];

        foreach ($recipients as $to) {
            try {
                $results[$to] = $this->sendSms($to, $body);
            } catch (\Exception $e) {
                $results[$to] = [
                    'success' => false,
                    'error' => $e->getMessage(),
                ];

                Log::warning('Bulk SMS: Failed to send to recipient', [
                    'to' => $to,
                    'error' => $e->getMessage(),
                ]);
            }
        }

        return $results;
    }

    /**
     * Retrieve the status of a previously sent message.
     *
     * @param string $messageSid The Twilio message SID
     * @return array
     *
     * @throws RuntimeException
     */
    public function getMessageStatus(string $messageSid): array
    {
        $url = "{$this->baseUrl}/Messages/{$messageSid}.json";

        try {
            $response = Http::withBasicAuth($this->accountSid, $this->authToken)
                ->timeout(30)
                ->get($url);

            if ($response->successful()) {
                return $response->json();
            }

            throw new RuntimeException(
                "Failed to retrieve message status: " . ($response->json()['message'] ?? 'Unknown error'),
                $response->status()
            );
        } catch (RuntimeException $e) {
            throw $e;
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(
                "Failed to retrieve message status: {$e->getMessage()}",
                0,
                $e
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Validate a phone number is in E.164 format.
     *
     * @param string $phoneNumber
     * @throws InvalidArgumentException
     */
    protected function validatePhoneNumber(string $phoneNumber): void
    {
        if (!preg_match('/^\+[1-9]\d{1,14}$/', $phoneNumber)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                "Invalid phone number format: '{$phoneNumber}'. Phone numbers must be in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890)."
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Validate the message body.
     *
     * @param string $body
     * @throws InvalidArgumentException
     */
    protected function validateMessageBody(string $body): void
    {
        if (empty(trim($body))) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Message body cannot be empty.');
        }

        if (mb_strlen($body) > 1600) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                'Message body exceeds the maximum length of 1600 characters.'
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get the configured "from" phone number.
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getFromNumber(): string
    {
        return $this->fromNumber;
    }
}

<?php

// Service Provider Registration (app/Providers/AppServiceProvider.php or a dedicated provider)

namespace App\Providers;

use App\Services\TwilioSmsService;
use Illuminate\Support\ServiceProvider;

class TwilioServiceProvider extends ServiceProvider
{
    public function register(): void
    {
        $this->app->singleton(TwilioSmsService::class, function ($app) {
            return new TwilioSmsService();
        });
    }

    public function boot(): void
    {
        //
    }
}
